request_payload.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep America safe. Some politicians talk about cutting defense budgets to fund domestic programs, but that's a dangerous trade-off. Remember what happened in Ukraine - without strong alliances, we're vulnerable. Our commitments abroad are the best deterrent we have. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
